chapter_description: Laws of thermodynamics, entropy, heat engines, Carnot cycle

questions.text: In an adiabatic process, which quantity remains zero?
questions.explanation: Adiabatic means no heat exchange: Q = 0

questions.text: An ideal gas undergoes isothermal expansion at 300 K, volume doubles. If n = 2 mol, find work done (in Joules). Use R = 8.314. Round to nearest integer.
